title: FIN Bridge Poll Request
description: The only body the agent POSTs to /fin/v1/poll. Agent -> server. Wraps the results of commands executed since the last poll and any buffered events, plus version, identity, and liveness fields. Its arrival refreshes the agent's liveness.

results.title: Results
results.description: Result envelopes for commands executed since the last poll. Possibly empty.

events.title: Events
events.description: Buffered event envelopes drained from the agent's bounded ring. Possibly empty.

droppedEvents.title: Dropped Events (running count)
droppedEvents.description: Running count of events the agent's drop-oldest ring has discarded since boot. Tells the server telemetry gaps exist even when the events array looks healthy.
